result.stdout:
This package is deprecated use FlubuCore.Tool instead. Package was just renamed to FlubuCore.Tool because as of .Net Core 3.0 local and global tools exists.
Usage: flubu [options] <<Target> [build script arguments]>

Arguments:
  <Target> [build script arguments]             The target to execute.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                  Show help information.
  -s|--script <SCRIPT>                          Build script file to use.
  -i|--interactive                              Run's Flubu core in interactive
                                                mode
  --parallel                                    If applied target's are executed
                                                in parallel
  -tte|--targetsToExecute <TARGETS_TO_EXECUTE>  Target's that must be executed.
                                                Otherwise fails.
  -d|--debug                                    Enable debug logging.
  -cf|--configurationFile                       Path to the Flubu json
                                                configuration file. If not
                                                specified configuration is read
                                                from flubusettings.json
                                                
  -ass                                          Directory to search assemblies
                                                to include automatically in
                                                script (Assemblies in
                                                subdirectories are also loaded).
                                                If not specified assemblies are
                                                loaded by default from FlubuLib
                                                directory.
                                                
  -nd|--nodeps                                  If applied no target
                                                dependencies are executed.
  --dryRun                                      Performs a dry run of the
                                                specified target.
  --noint                                       Disables interactive mode for
                                                all task members. Default values
                                                are used instead.
                                                
  --noColor                                     Disables colored logging
  --ci                                          Generates configuration file for
                                                specified continous integration
                                                server. Supported values:
                                                Jenkins, AppVeyor, Travis,
                                                AzurePipelines, GithubActions

Flubu internal commands:
  <Target> help                                 Shows detailed help for specified target.
  new                                           Creates new build script project from template. Execute 'flubu new' for list of templates.
  setup                                         Store locations of build script, project file or flubu settings file into '.flubu' file.
                                                You should execute this command at the root of your repository.
Flubu v.6.4.4.0
Script file path was not explicitly specified, searching the default locations.
EXECUTION FAILED:
The build script file was not found.  Please specify location of the build script in the argument '-s={PathToBuildScript}' or run 'flubu setup' to store the location in a file or use some of the default paths for script file:
buildscript.cs
BuildScript.cs
deployscript.cs
DeployScript.cs
DeploymentScript.cs
Build.cs
_Build/Build.cs
build/Build.cs
Build/Build.cs
build/BuildScript.cs
Build/BuildScript.cs
_Build/BuildScript.cs
_BuildScript/BuildScript.cs
_BuildScripts/BuildScript.cs
BuildScript/BuildScript.cs
BuildScripts/BuildScript.cs
BuildScript/DeployScript.cs
BuildScripts/DeployScript.cs
BuildScript/DeploymentScript.cs
BuildScripts/DeploymentScript.cs

Usage: flubu [options] <<Target> [build script arguments]>
